wikitext: []: "Rebuild and Japanese swords" exhibition [Video]             Quote Post by Joseki » Sat May 06, 2017 2:24 am One the youtubers I follow uploaded a video recorded at the 「ヱヴァンゲリヲンと日本刀展」exhibition, which Google translate as "rebuild and Japanese swords" or similar. The exhibition is only sligthly related to Evangelion and video is in italian but it's better than nothing I guess: Video
